name: 10_Face_Recognition_FaceNet_LFW_DL
query: Nisaidie kuunda mradi wa utambuzi wa uso wa PyTorch ukitumia mfano wa FaceNet na seti ya data ya LFW. Pakia seti ya data katika `src/model.py`. Pata mfano kutoka Hugging Face (unaweza kuupata kwenye https://huggingface.co/py-feat/facenet) na uuhifadhi katika `models/saved_models/`. Hakikisha data imeandaliwa ili kuhakikisha usanifishaji wa picha za uso katika `src/data_loader.py`. Tumia embeddings za uso katika `src/model.py` ili kuboresha utendaji wa mfumo wako. Chapisha usahihi wa utambuzi na uuhifadhi katika `results/metrics/recognition_accuracy.txt`. Kisha, onyesha matokeo ya embedding na uyahifadhi kama `results/figures/embedding_visualization.png`. Mfano unapaswa kupakia bila matatizo, ikiwezekana na utunzaji wa makosa ikiwa kuna tatizo. Mionyesho inapaswa kufanya iwe rahisi kuona jinsi embeddings zinavyowakilisha vipengele tofauti vya uso.

requirements.criteria: Seti ya data ya "LFW" (Labeled Faces in the Wild) inapakiwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Ulinganifu wa data na usanifishaji wa picha za uso unafanywa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Mfano wa "FaceNet" katika "PyTorch" unatumika, ukipakiwa kutoka [Hugging Face](https://huggingface.co/py-feat/facenet). Hifadhi mfano katika models/saved_models/.
Usahihi wa utambuzi unachapishwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/metrics/recognition_accuracy.txt`.
Matokeo ya embedding yanaonyeshwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/figures/embedding_visualization.png`.

preferences.criteria: Mchakato wa kupakia mfano unapaswa kuwa laini, na utunzaji wazi wa masuala yoyote ikiwa mfano utashindwa kupakia.
Mionyesho ya embeddings inapaswa kuwa wazi na kuonyesha kwa ufanisi vipengele tofauti vya uso.

hint: The page https://huggingface.co/py-feat/facenet provides guidance on how to use FaceNet; however, Hugging Face does not currently offer a model entry for direct use.

judge_stats.criteria: Seti ya data ya "LFW" (Labeled Faces in the Wild) inapakiwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The requirement that the "LFW" dataset is loaded in `src/data_loader.py` is not fully satisfied. Although the file `src/data_loader.py` is involved in the loading process, the provided code snippet only contains a placeholder function `load_dataset()` that returns a minimal dictionary indicating a dataset is "loaded" without any actual implementation of loading the LFW dataset. Additionally, trajectory evidence indicates issues with library version mismatches and a memory error, which further suggests that the dataset loading process is not robust or complete.

judge_stats.criteria: Ulinganifu wa data na usanifishaji wa picha za uso unafanywa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The requirement specifies that data alignment and standardization of facial images should be performed in `src/data_loader.py`. However, the provided content of `data_loader.py` only includes a placeholder function `load_dataset()` and a placeholder for data augmentation `build_transforms()`, which mentions "rotation", "scaling", and "normalization". There is no explicit implementation or evidence of data alignment and standardization of facial images in the code. Additionally, the trajectory evidence mentions an issue with library version compatibility for image standardization, which suggests that the standardization process might not be fully reliable.

judge_stats.criteria: Mfano wa "FaceNet" katika "PyTorch" unatumika, ukipakiwa kutoka [Hugging Face](https://huggingface.co/py-feat/facenet). Hifadhi mfano katika models/saved_models/.

reason: <SATISFIED>: The requirement that the "FaceNet" model in "PyTorch" is used and loaded from [Hugging Face](https://huggingface.co/py-feat/facenet) is satisfied. The trajectory evidence indicates that the model was successfully loaded from Hugging Face without errors, and it was stored in `models/saved_models/`, confirming the successful implementation and storage of the model as required.

<SATISFIED>: The requirement that facial embeddings are used in `src/model.py` is satisfied. The content of the file `model.py` includes a section that explicitly mentions the implementation of facial embeddings, as indicated by the `REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA` list containing the statement "Facial embeddings are used in `src/model.py`." Additionally, the trajectory evidence confirms that `src/model.py` was involved in the execution of facial embeddings, with no errors reported during the process, indicating successful implementation.

judge_stats.criteria: Usahihi wa utambuzi unachapishwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/metrics/recognition_accuracy.txt`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The requirement for recognition accuracy to be published and stored in `results/metrics/recognition_accuracy.txt` is not satisfied. The content of the file is a placeholder (`('placeholder\r\n', None)`) rather than actual recognition accuracy data. This indicates that the file does not contain the expected metric information.

judge_stats.criteria: Matokeo ya embedding yanaonyeshwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/figures/embedding_visualization.png`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The requirement that the embedding results are displayed and stored as `results/figures/embedding_visualization.png` is not satisfied. Although the project structure indicates the presence of the file, the content of the file reveals an error message indicating that the image is unsupported and could not be parsed. This suggests that the embedding visualization was not successfully stored as a valid image file.
